description: Before an order is packed, the system must generate a packing list to be included inside the box.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the details of the order to be packed.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the order and its contents.

nodes.task_description: Verify the items and quantities that have been picked for the order.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the picked items match the order.

nodes.task_description: Generate and print the packing list document.

expected_outcome.value: A packing list is successfully printed, showing the items and quantities being shipped.
